app.name: Vibe Reach
app.tagline: Locate your audience and scale your influence.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noCampaigns: No campaigns yet. Start an investigation to begin.

investigation.title: New Campaign
investigation.promptPlaceholder: e.g. I have a judicial abuse case and want to find journalists, investigative reporters, NGOs and organizations that could help expose this issue.
investigation.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your product, service, case or communication objective in detail. The more context you provide, the better the AI analysis will be. Include your goals, target impact, desired outcomes, budget considerations, timeline, or any specific requirements...
investigation.noApiKey: Configure your AI API key in Settings first.
investigation.analyzingSubtext: The AI is reviewing your brief and crafting your campaign intelligence report.
investigation.scrapingSubtext: The AI is discovering relevant websites and extracting contact information.
investigation.scrapingNotice: Real contact data is being extracted from live websites. This may take a few minutes depending on the number of targets.
investigation.targetGenFailed: Could not generate target websites. Try adjusting your campaign criteria and try again.
investigation.energyTooltip: Your sending quota. Each campaign action consumes energy. It refills automatically every hour.
investigation.energyLow: ⚡ Low energy — wait for refill or contact support.
investigation.contactTypeTooltip: Choose the type of entity you want to target: companies, private individuals, or public/government institutions.
investigation.affinityTooltip: Select the industry sector and specific niche closest to your campaign target. More specific = better results.
investigation.targetingTooltip: Filter contacts by language and country/region. Use "Any" to cast a wider net.
investigation.consistencyTooltip: Controls how strictly the AI matches contacts. Low = broad discovery, more variety. High = tight filtering, higher relevance.
investigation.descriptionTooltip: Describe your campaign objective in detail. Include context, goals, desired impact, and any specifics. The AI uses this to build your strategy.
investigation.targetCountTooltip: Set how many contacts to discover. Each page visited costs 1 energy unit — 10 pages = 1% energy. Min 10, max 1,000.
investigation.energyWarning: Only {{available}} energy available. {{total}} contacts requested — scraping will stop when energy runs out.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
contacts.noContacts: No contacts found. Run an investigation to discover contacts.
contacts.name: Name

history.title: Activity History
history.selectSection: Select a section to view process details.

reports.title: Reports
reports.noCampaigns: No campaigns available. Create a campaign first.
reports.demoDataHint: Showing demo campaigns — create real campaigns to generate real reports.
reports.clientPdfHint: Will appear as "Prepared for:" on the PDF cover page.
reports.noReportsHint: Click "New Report" and select a campaign to generate your first report.
reports.analysisUnavailable: No investigation analysis saved for this campaign
reports.analysisUnavailableHint: Analysis will be available if generated from the Investigation tab.
reports.selectCampaign: Select a campaign to generate a report

ai.title: AI Configuration
ai.description: Configure multiple AI providers. The system will use the first available and automatically switch to the next on failure.
ai.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one below.
ai.failoverDescription: If the primary provider fails, the system will automatically switch to the next one in priority order.

business.title: Company Profile
business.description: Optional data automatically applied in reports and campaigns.
business.emailHint: Used as default sender in new campaigns (overridable).

export.title: Export & Downloads
export.folderHint: Click "Select" to choose a folder on your computer, or type the name manually.

profile.title: Behavior Profile
profile.description: Select how the stealth engine emulates human behavior.

runtime.title: Runtime Environment
runtime.description: Controls how services behave. Only visible in Debug Mode.
runtime.simulationDesc: No real outreach. AI and scraping return mock data.
runtime.productionDesc: Full system operation. Real outreach actions.
